Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.cime

Class CiMeChatBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.cime.CiMeChatBuilder
public class CiMeChatBuilder extends Object
Builder for CiMeChat instances.

Defaults are auto-reconnect enabled and debug mode disabled.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    CiMeChatBuilder(String channelSlug)
    Creates a builder for a CiMe channel input.

  • Constructor Details

    • CiMeChatBuilder

      public CiMeChatBuilder(String channelSlug)
      Creates a builder for a CiMe channel input.
      Parameters:
      channelSlug - channel slug or CiMe channel URL

  • Method Details

    • resolveSlug

      public static String resolveSlug(String input)
      Resolves a channel input into a normalized slug.
      Parameters:
      input - channel slug, handle, or URL
      Returns:
      normalized slug

    • withChatListener

      public CiMeChatBuilder withChatListener(CiMeChatEventListener listener)
      Adds a chat event listener. Default is no listeners.
      Parameters:
      listener - listener to add
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withAutoReconnect

      public CiMeChatBuilder withAutoReconnect(boolean autoReconnect)
      Configures automatic reconnection. Default is true.
      Parameters:
      autoReconnect - whether automatic reconnect is enabled
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withDebugMode

      public CiMeChatBuilder withDebugMode()
      Enables debug logging. Default is disabled.
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • build

      public CiMeChat build()
      Builds a CiMeChat instance.
      Returns:
      a configured CiMe chat client
